sentences.arabic: تَتَنَاوَلُ هِنْدٌ وَجْبَةَ الْإِفْطَارِ كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ.

sentences.translation: Jede jaja i hljeb i pije mlijeko.
sentences.translationEn: She eats eggs and bread and drinks milk.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتْ إِنَّ الْإِفْطَارَ يُعِينُهَا عَلَى التَّرْكِيزِ فِي الدِّرَاسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Rekla je da joj doručak pomaže da se koncentriše na učenje.
sentences.translationEn: She said that breakfast helps her concentrate on studying.

sentences.arabic: لَا تَخْرُجُ مِنَ الْبَيْتِ قَبْلَ أَنْ تَأْكُلَ.
sentences.translation: Ne izlazi iz kuće prije nego što pojede.
sentences.translationEn: She does not leave the house before eating.

sentences.arabic: صِحَّتُهَا جَيِّدَةٌ وَتَشْعُرُ بِالنَّشَاطِ طَوَالَ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Njezino zdravlje je dobro i osjeća se aktivno cijeli dan.
sentences.translationEn: Her health is good and she feels active throughout the day.
